realm-rival.title: Realm Rival
realm-rival.hook: Competitive multiplayer action game with responsive combat and objective-driven gameplay.
realm-rival.technicalOverview: Built a fast-paced competitive framework with client-side prediction, server authority validation, and real-time player feedback systems.
keyFeatures: Real-time competitive matchmaking with balanced team spawning
Responsive combat feedback with frame-perfect input handling
Dynamic objective progression system with event broadcasting
Player stat tracking and session persistence across matches

technicalBreakdown.architecture: Server-authoritative multiplayer framework with client-side prediction
technicalBreakdown.networking: Replicated actors, RPCs for critical events, optimized tick rates
technicalBreakdown.systems: Match state machine, team management, score tracking

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Maintaining responsiveness while ensuring server authority
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented client-side prediction with server reconciliation for smooth 60fps play
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Balancing players across teams in real-time
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built dynamic team balancing algorithm that runs pre-match and during team switches

word-dash.title: Word Dash
word-dash.hook: Multiplayer word-puzzle game with session management and competitive scoring.
word-dash.technicalOverview: Designed and implemented a complete multiplayer game loop with word validation systems, session state management, and data-driven configuration.
keyFeatures: Real-time word validation with dictionary integration
Session-based multiplayer with persistent leaderboards
Data-driven word list configuration and difficulty scaling
Player state synchronization across network sessions

technicalBreakdown.architecture: Game Instance-based session manager with GameState for shared match data
technicalBreakdown.gameplay: Turn-based word mechanics with real-time validation
technicalBreakdown.networking: Actor replication for player scores and match progression
technicalBreakdown.systems: Leaderboard tracking, save-game serialization, UI state binding

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Synchronizing word validation across clients in real-time
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Centralized validation on server with client-side prediction for immediate feedback
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing complex UI state across menu, lobby, and gameplay screens
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built UI state machine with context switching for different game phases

legend-of-indra.title: Legend of Indra vs Vritrasur
legend-of-indra.hook: Full-scale action RPG with advanced combat, AI systems, and narrative-driven encounters.
legend-of-indra.technicalOverview: Complete gameplay architecture for an action RPG including melee combat, advanced AI behavior trees, dynamic encounter design, and progression systems.
keyFeatures: Combo-based combat system with hit detection and damage scaling
Behavior Tree AI with dynamic decision-making and adaptive difficulty
Quest system with objective tracking and narrative branching
Character progression with stats, equipment, and ability unlocks

technicalBreakdown.combatSystem: Animation-notified hit detection, combo chaining, poise mechanics
technicalBreakdown.aiSystems: Behavior Trees with state transitions, perception systems, threat evaluation
technicalBreakdown.questSystem: State-based quest tracking, objective updates, conditional rewards
technicalBreakdown.progression: Inventory management, equipment stats, ability unlock system

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Creating responsive combat that feels impactful at 60fps
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented lag-compensated hit detection with client-side movement prediction
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: AI that adapts without feeling cheap or predictable
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built threat-based AI with dynamic behavior selection and difficulty scaling curves

rewind-system.title: Rewind Component System
rewind-system.hook: Advanced time-manipulation mechanic with frame-perfect replay and visual feedback.
rewind-system.technicalOverview: Built a complete time-rewind system capturing and replaying player state history with synchronized visuals and audio for seamless temporal gameplay.
keyFeatures: Frame-accurate state recording and playback system
Ghost actor visualization with material effects
Synchronized audio and particle effects with rewind timeline
Input-based rewind triggering with smooth state transitions

technicalBreakdown.playbackEngine: Timeline-based interpolation for smooth state restoration
technicalBreakdown.visualEffects: Ghost material with custom shader, trail particle systems
technicalBreakdown.audioSystem: Time-synced audio playback with pitch modulation

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Memory efficiency with large history buffers
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented circular buffer with configurable frame limit and delta compression
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Smooth playback while maintaining accurate state restoration
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Cubic interpolation between frames with per-component easing curves

prototype-rpg.title: Prototype For RPG Game
prototype-rpg.hook: Modular RPG framework with interaction, progression, and combat-ready architecture.
prototype-rpg.technicalOverview: Foundational RPG systems including character progression, interactable objects, modular damage handling, and extensible gameplay components.
keyFeatures: Component-based damage system supporting multiple damage types
Interactable interface for world objects and NPCs
Modular progression system with stat scaling and ability unlocks
Area-of-effect ability framework for instant and over-time effects

technicalBreakdown.damageSystem: Interface-based damageable contract, damage type enums, effect application
technicalBreakdown.interaction: Overlap-based detection with interaction queue for consistent handling
technicalBreakdown.progression: Stat arrays with level-based scaling, ability component attachment
technicalBreakdown.effects: Instanced AOE actors with configurable radius and duration

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Maintaining clean separation between damage logic and gameplay
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented interface-based damage contract allowing reuse across player/enemy/objects
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Scaling complexity as new damage types and effects were added
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Data-driven effect system with scriptable effect types and modular applications

isles-of-echoes.title: Isles Of Echoes On Cybertrom
isles-of-echoes.hook: Advanced character framework with weapon handling, layered animations, and combat-ready systems.
isles-of-echoes.technicalOverview: Built on ALS (Advanced Locomotion System) with extended weapon mechanics, interaction systems, and modular damage logic creating a responsive game-ready character framework.
keyFeatures: ALS-based locomotion with smooth state transitions and layered animations
Rifle and pistol mechanics with weapon equip/unequip states
Aiming offset system for multiple stances and weapon types
Interface-based damage system with health tracking and feedback

technicalBreakdown.locomotion: ALS foundation with movement states, transitions, and animation layers
technicalBreakdown.weaponSystem: Weapon equip/unequip, animation blueprint switching, aiming offsets
technicalBreakdown.animation: Dedicated ABPs per weapon type, hit reactions, combat animations
technicalBreakdown.damage: Interface-based damage contract, damage types, health bars

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Smooth animation transitions between weapon types
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented dedicated animation blueprints per weapon with state-based blending
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Maintaining responsive aiming while switching weapons
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built aim offset system with per-weapon stance support

reality-run.title: Reality Run
reality-run.hook: Sci-fi action-combat prototype with dynamic encounters and exploration-focused design.
reality-run.technicalOverview: Comprehensive combat framework supporting melee/ranged gameplay, enemy archetypes, VFX-driven abilities, and multiple themed environments.
keyFeatures: Modular damage system with multiple damage types
Enemy hierarchy with base, melee, ranged, and boss variants
AOE ability framework for instant and over-time effects
Dynamic world building with multiple themed environments

technicalBreakdown.damage: Component-based damage framework, damageable interface, effect application
technicalBreakdown.enemies: Enemy blueprint hierarchy, specialized variants, AI decision-making
technicalBreakdown.abilities: AOE base system, configurable effects, radius and duration
technicalBreakdown.world: Multiple content packs, modular plugin architecture, VFX libraries

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Creating balanced combat across different enemy types
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Built data-driven enemy configuration with stat arrays and scaling curves
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing complex interactions between effects and environment
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Implemented effect queue system with priority-based application

lost-cure.title: Lost Cure
lost-cure.hook: Narrative-driven action adventure with objective-based gameplay and tension-building systems.
lost-cure.technicalOverview: Third-person action prototype with projectile-based combat, boss encounter design, complete UI flow, and environmental interaction.
keyFeatures: Projectile-based attack system with elemental variants
Boss encounter state machine with phase transitions
Complete UI flow from main menu through end-game screens
Interactive environmental systems with teleportation mechanics

technicalBreakdown.combat: Projectile variants, attack component architecture, damage scaling
technicalBreakdown.bossDesign: State machine with phase transitions, pattern-based behavior
technicalBreakdown.ui: Main menu, pause/settings, HUD, end-game screens
technicalBreakdown.environment: Interactive objects, teleportation, water systems, PCG

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Creating challenging boss encounters without frustration
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented telegraphed attack patterns with adaptive difficulty
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing complex UI flow across multiple screens
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built state-based UI manager with scene transitions

bubble-trap.title: Bubble Trap
bubble-trap.hook: 2D action-platformer with bubble-based combat mechanic for enemy trapping and arena control.
bubble-trap.technicalOverview: Complete action-platformer built in Unity 6 with bubble trapping mechanics, dual enemy AI systems, reward progression, and multi-scene architecture.
keyFeatures: Bubble-based combat: spawn, grow, merge, trap, and pop mechanics at cursor position
Dual enemy AI: melee chasers and ranged shooters with distinct combat patterns
Reward-driven progression with score thresholds triggering level completion
Boss encounter with health visualization and projectile interactions

technicalBreakdown.playerSystems: Movement controller with animation states (idle/walk/jump/hurt/death), health tracking, event-driven callbacks
technicalBreakdown.bubbleMechanic: Click-to-spawn at cursor, growth merging, size-based enemy trapping, timeout destruction, pop effects
technicalBreakdown.enemyAI: Melee chase behavior, ranged projectile AI, spawner with timed waves, adaptive spawn intervals
technicalBreakdown.progressionSystem: Reward drops, point collection, score UI updates, level threshold triggers, win/lose conditions

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Creating engaging combat through bubble mechanics without traditional attacks
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented cursor-based bubble spawning with growth merging, requiring strategic placement
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing multiple simultaneous enemy types with different behaviors
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built separate AI systems for melee/ranged with spawner wave management

paint-runner.title: It's Me Pico
paint-runner.hook: Competitive territory-control mobile game with tile ownership, adaptive AI, quests, and monetization.
paint-runner.technicalOverview: Manager-driven mobile architecture with event-based communication, NavMesh AI, quest systems, and cross-scene persistence.
keyFeatures: Real-time tile ownership and scoring with event-driven updates
Adaptive AI opponent with difficulty scaling from player win streak
Daily/weekly quest systems with automatic UTC reset scheduling
Complete monetization: rewarded ads, currency economy, lives, shop

technicalBreakdown.gameplayCore: Event-driven tile ownership updates, game state transitions, winner resolution, IPaintable interface
technicalBreakdown.aiSystem: NavMesh-based movement, sensing/target selection, high-value target prioritization, adaptive difficulty
technicalBreakdown.progressionSystems: Daily/weekly quests with reset timers, level progression, AI scaling, reward distribution
technicalBreakdown.monetization: Rewarded ads integration, currency economy, lives system, shop, progression incentives

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Managing real-time multiplayer-feel competition with single AI opponent
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Event-driven architecture decouples AI from tile updates, enabling responsive single-player experience
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Balancing game difficulty while maintaining fairness and engagement
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Implemented adaptive difficulty scaling from player win streak and level progression

slimey-jump.title: Slimey Jump
slimey-jump.hook: 2D vertical endless platformer with drag-jump mechanics, card-based progression, quests, shop, and idle economy.
slimey-jump.technicalOverview: Complete endless platformer in Unity 6 combining arcade action with deep progression systems, monetization, and hybrid idle mechanics.
keyFeatures: Drag-and-release jump with trajectory preview in procedurally generated vertical levels
Dynamic camera pressure with off-screen grace timer and difficulty scaling
Card-based progression with rarity levels, upgrades, and permanent gameplay effects
Complete economy: coins, shop, quests, leaderboards, and rewarded ads

technicalBreakdown.coreGameplay: Player controller with drag input, trajectory rendering, cling logic, health/revive system
technicalBreakdown.difficultySystem: Camera pressure, score-based milestone triggers, difficulty-weighted spawning, trap variants
technicalBreakdown.proceduralGen: Object pooling, weighted platform spawning (static/moving/trap/small), adaptive patterns
technicalBreakdown.progressionSystems: Cards with rarity/upgrades, daily/weekly quests with UTC resets, shop with purchases, leaderboards

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Balancing moment-to-moment action with meta progression retention
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Built separate gameplay/systems/UI layers with event-driven communication
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing online leaderboard sync without breaking offline gameplay
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Implemented encrypted profile persistence with async leaderboard submission via UnityWebRequest

surprise-sprint.title: Surprise Sprint
surprise-sprint.hook: Dynamic endless runner with procedurally generated platforms, power-up systems, and persistent progression.
surprise-sprint.technicalOverview: Event-driven endless runner built in Unity 6 with procedural level generation, power-up mechanics, and comprehensive menu/settings systems.
keyFeatures: Continuous forward movement with responsive jump and dash mechanics
Procedurally generated platforms with randomized X/Y gaps
Power-up system with buff/debuff/gravity variations
Complete menu and settings with audio/graphics controls

technicalBreakdown.gameplay: Forward movement, jump mechanics, dash cooldown, collision detection
technicalBreakdown.eventBus: Central Actions.cs with static event channels for decoupled communication
technicalBreakdown.ui: Main menu, pause menu, settings persistence via PlayerPrefs

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Maintaining performance with infinite procedural generation
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented object pooling and cleanup system for recycled segments
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Decoupling gameplay systems for maintainable architecture
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built event bus using static Actions delegates for loose coupling

word-game.title: Word Game
word-game.hook: Location-themed word puzzle with meta progression, economy systems, and travel-based narrative.
word-game.technicalOverview: Modular Unity architecture combining word puzzle mechanics with location progression, NPC interactions, and economy-driven meta loops.
keyFeatures: Location-based progression with MapButton lock/unlock flow and persistent state
Word puzzle generation via WordPickerSO with data-driven difficulty scaling
Economy system with ShopDisplay, currency management, and chest mechanics
NPC dialogue and interaction system with timed behaviors

technicalBreakdown.coreGameplay: GameController session management, LevelControllerBase puzzle generation, progressive difficulty
technicalBreakdown.progression: Location unlock system, MapButton state persistence, PlayLocation transitions
technicalBreakdown.economy: ShopDisplay currency management, chest system with slot management, ScriptableObject balancing
technicalBreakdown.interaction: RandomWalkNPC dialogue triggers, event-driven NPC system, TimeManager inactive cues

challengesAndSolutions.challenge1: Balancing word puzzle difficulty with player progression
challengesAndSolutions.solution1: Implemented WordPickerSO with data-driven target logic for adaptive difficulty curves
challengesAndSolutions.challenge2: Managing complex location state and transitions
challengesAndSolutions.solution2: Built MapButton lock/unlock flow with persistent state and smooth PlayLocation animations
